backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Smart Chain Earnings backend with user profile management, referral ID generation, wallet operations (deposit, transfer, withdrawal), and transaction logging, protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two OTP login redirect features (admin vs. user routing and admin panel access control) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Smart Chain Earnings React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with public routes (login, register) and protected layout-wrapped routes (dashboard, deposit, withdrawal, team, admin, profile setup), then renders the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar component rendering Home, Deposit, Withdraw, and Team links with gold active-state styling using TanStack Router's navigate and location hooks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Protected layout wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users to login, users without profiles to setup, and non-admin users away from /admin to /dashboard, while conditionally rendering the BottomNavBar.
frontend/src/components/LevelMilestoneTa: Renders a styled table of 10 referral level milestones showing team size targets, rewards (including special Goa/Foreign Tour prizes), and achieved/pending status based on provided team count data.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a labeled statistic with an optional icon, subtext, and highlight styling using gold gradients.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, OTP send/verify (client-side simulation), balance queries, and transaction queries/mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines Tailwind base/component/utility layers, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a navy/gold theme, and reusable component classes like card-navy, btn-gold, and gold-text.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page that displays all user balances and transactions, and provides controls to add balance, approve withdrawals, and refresh data, with access restricted to a specific mobile number.
frontend/src/pages/DepositPage.tsx: Page that allows users to deposit funds by displaying admin UPI payment details, entering an amount, and updating their wallet balance and profile totals on submission.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page implementing a two-step mobile OTP flow (send OTP, then verify) followed by Internet Identity authentication, redirecting admin or regular users to their respective dashboards.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup page that collects name, mobile, and optional referral code, creates a referral ID, saves the user profile to the canister, and initializes a wallet balance.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page that reads a referral code from the URL, collects user details, generates a referral ID, saves the profile, and initializes the user's wallet before redirecting to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/TeamPage.tsx: Team page displaying network size, level income stats, a copyable referral link, and a level commission structure table for the logged-in user.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: Main user dashboard showing wallet balance, income stats, referral code sharing, recent transactions, and navigation to deposit/withdrawal/team pages with logout functionality.
frontend/src/pages/WithdrawalPage.tsx: React page that allows users to submit withdrawal requests, showing available balance, quick percentage buttons, and an amount input with validation (minimum ₹100, must not exceed balance). On submit, calls the withdraw mutation and updates the user's withdrawal total in their profile.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to extract URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading the page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Rajdhani), oklch-based color tokens (gold, navy, chart, sidebar), custom box shadows, border radii, and shimmer/accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 5) describing the Smart Chain Earnings MLM/referral platform, listing architectural notes, known issues, and all existing implemented features such as OTP login, registration, dashboard, deposit, withdrawal, and team pages.
